overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating through a rain-soaked neon-lit Night City. The player drives from a covered parking structure through elevated highways and busy downtown streets, eventually stopping at a traffic light behind a white van while surrounded by towering digital billboards.

events.description: exiting covered parking garage into open rainy street

agents.ego_description: navigating out of a covered parking structure onto rain-slicked roads, accelerating to merge with highway traffic

entered.detail: gray concrete walls of the parking structure interior
intense red neon illumination on building facade ahead
modern building with reflective glass windows
illuminated advertisement screen on building side
yellow and black striped safety barriers along the road edge

segments.scene_description: The video begins inside a covered parking structure with concrete walls and red neon-lit buildings visible through the exit. The vehicle turns left onto a ramp, passing yellow guardrails and digital billboards, accelerating as it emerges into the heavy rain of the open city.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated multi-lane highway with overhead signage

events.description: merging with moderate highway traffic flow
slowing down while approaching city exit ramp

agents.ego_description: cruising at high speed on the elevated highway, navigating through moderate traffic with rain streaking across the windshield

entered.detail: metal safety barriers lining both sides of the elevated road
large metal structure spanning the road with directional signs
tall poles with bright lights illuminating the highway
tall building silhouettes visible through the rain haze

segments.scene_description: Driving at high speed along an elevated highway lined with guardrails and overhead signage. The road stretches ahead through the rainy night, flanked by rows of streetlights and distant skyscraper silhouettes visible through the haze.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy downtown intersection with pedestrian crosswalks

events.description: stopping at intersection for pedestrians crossing with umbrellas
navigating through intersection with cross traffic
entering denser commercial district with heavy neon signage

agents.ego_description: navigating through city intersections, slowing for pedestrians with umbrellas and cross traffic, accelerating between stops

notable_agents.action: person holding umbrella waiting at crosswalk corner

entered.detail: broad yellow striped crosswalk markings on the asphalt
brightly lit shop signs and advertisements at street level
pedestrian bridge crossing above the street between buildings
illuminated signal lights hanging over the intersection

segments.scene_description: Descending from the highway into dense urban streets marked with yellow crosswalk lines. Pedestrians with umbrellas wait at corners while neon storefronts illuminate the sidewalks. The vehicle weaves through intersections, stopping at red lights and accelerating through green.

scene_state.functional_zone: congested commercial arterial with heavy traffic and digital billboards

events.description: stopping behind white van at red traffic light
camera pans right to view white sports car in adjacent lane while stopped

agents.ego_description: crawling through heavy downtown traffic behind a white delivery van, then stopping at a red light and panning to observe a sports car

notable_agents.action: white delivery van stopped at traffic light ahead
white sports car with blue racing stripes waiting in right lane

entered.detail: boxy white commercial vehicle with red tail lights stopped ahead
sleek white supercar with blue racing stripes in the right lane
massive suspended screen displaying colorful advertisements above the road

segments.scene_description: Crawling through heavy downtown traffic behind a white delivery van, surrounded by towering digital billboards and neon signage. The vehicle comes to a complete stop at a red light, where the camera pans right to reveal a sleek white sports car with blue racing stripes waiting in the adjacent lane.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive that transitions from the enclosed confines of a parking structure into the expansive, rain-soaked neon sprawl of a futuristic city. It begins within a concrete parking garage, turning left past yellow guardrails and digital billboards before accelerating out into a heavy downpour. As the vehicle gains speed, the scene opens onto an elevated highway where the camera glides past rows of streetlights and distant skyscraper silhouettes shrouded in a rainy haze. The perspective then descends from the highway into the dense urban core, shifting from the open road to narrow streets lined with glowing storefronts and pedestrians with umbrellas. Finally, the movement weaves through city intersections and yellow crosswalks, alternating between sudden stops at red lights and bursts of acceleration.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective through a dense urban corridor that culminates in a momentary standstill amidst the city's neon glow. It begins by crawling through heavy downtown traffic, trailing closely behind a white delivery van while towering digital billboards and vibrant signage loom overhead. As the vehicle slows to a complete stop at a red light, the surrounding city lights reflect off the rain-slicked surfaces. The camera then pans smoothly to the right, shifting focus from the van to reveal a sleek white sports car with blue racing stripes idling in the adjacent lane.
